concept: Would you create an arcade game where players control a magnetic sphere that attracts or repels metallic objects in the environment? The polarity switching mechanism allows for complex object manipulation, creating chain reactions to solve puzzles or defeat enemies. Arena designs feature increasingly elaborate metallic structures that can be collapsed onto enemies or reconfigured to create paths. Special power nodes can be activated by precisely positioned metallic objects, requiring careful magnetic control to align components. Your character is attempting to restore power to an abandoned electromagnetic research facility by reactivating its core systems using the very technology it was designed to develop.
